g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Receptionist role in HealthConnect')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Nurse role in HealthConnect')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Doctor role in HealthConnect')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Hospital Administration as a stakeholder')
sendPrompt('What external systems interface with HealthConnect?')
sendPrompt('How do patients and parents benefit from HealthConnect?')
sendPrompt('How does the Pediatrics Department management benefit?')
sendPrompt('What role does the Ministry of Health play as a stakeholder?')
sendPrompt('What is the role of the software development team?')
sendPrompt('Who handles procurement and funding for HealthConnect?')
sendPrompt('What regulatory requirements apply to HealthConnect in Albania?')
sendPrompt('Who might resist the HealthConnect digital transition and why?')
sendPrompt('How does HealthConnect benefit the broader Albanian population?')
sendPrompt('Who funds QSUT and what stake do they have in HealthConnect?')
